package repository

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for stable_value_normalization_in_inner_loop: the same stable input is normalized inside an inner loop.
type CaseStableValueNormalizationInInnerLoopDTO struct {
    ID       string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status   string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount   int    `json:"amount"`
    Payload  []byte `json:"payload"`
}

func PositiveStableValueNormalizationInInnerLoop(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseStableValueNormalizationInInnerLoopDTO) error {
    for _, left := range items {
        for _, right := range items {
            normalized := strings.ToLower(strings.TrimSpace(input))
            if normalized == right.TenantID && left.ID != "" {
                c.Set(left.ID, right.Status)
            }
        }
    }
    return nil
}
